data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commit 01fc79d7 live on origin/main, (2) commit tag present on knot, (3) no remaining outdated references (beads viewer, Agent Memory Engagement, web UI for Beads), (4) all 5 file changes correctly reflect Foolery as agentic orchestration interface with Knots primary / Beads alternative. No invariants to check. No regressions.
